## Summary

What does this PR do?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Pipeline change (Bronze / Silver / Gold)
- [ ] Frontend change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / dependency update

## Testing

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make test-lint` passes
- [ ] Manually tested against sample data

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style guidelines (`make format`)
- [ ] New gold tables added to `docs/data_dictionary/`
- [ ] New dependencies added to `pyproject.toml` or `frontend/package.json`
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if this is a notable change
